# `networkConnection`

Toggles the device to be offline (airplane mode) or online (connected).
Use this tool to control network connectivity for the device.

## Source

- Kind: class-backed
- Class: `xyz.block.trailblaze.toolcalls.commands.NetworkConnectionTrailblazeTool`

## Contract

- Visible to LLM: yes (`surface_to_llm: true`)
- Recordable: yes (`is_recordable: true`)
- Host-only: no (`requires_host: false`)

## Input schema

### Required parameters

- `connected` — `Boolean`
  Whether the device should be connected or disconnected to the network.

Returns: `string` (opaque text content)
